fields.name: 00_research/v1.json
fields.source: sibling file in outputs/<id>/ (defensive: missing -> proceed without merge)

input_schema.hcom_message_example: hcom send --name <sender> "@research-pipeline-claude-2 ingest: <input_id>; input=<input_ref>; write outputs/<input_id>/01_ingest/v1.txt + v1.meta.json; then report to @research-pipeline-claude-6"

process.description: Call tools.fetch_input.fetch(<input_ref>) -> (text, meta_from_fetch). Compute input_id = tools.fetch_input.input_id_for(text).

If outputs/<id>/00_research/v1.json exists: read the dossier, build the ## Research Context block, append to text -> final_text, set meta.metadata.research_ref = '00_research/v1.json'. If missing: proceed without it.

process.code_block:
v = next_version(input_id, '01_ingest')
write_artifact(input_id, '01_ingest', v, final_text, ext='txt')

process.description: Optional: if source has rich metadata, also write v1.json matching schemas/01_ingest.json with text + metadata.
Build + write meta via build_meta + write_meta, merging meta_from_fetch and (optionally) metadata.research_ref.
Ack to @orch with the path. Then ping @critic with validate: <input_id> 01_ingest.

template.text: <full text including the Research Context block if merged>

artifact.text:
Quantum error correction 2026

## Research Context

Quantum error correction matured significantly in 2026...

**Sources:**
[1] QEC Review 2026 — https://example.com/qec-review-2026
[2] Google Condor Update — https://example.com/google-condor-2025

**Key findings:**
- Surface codes crossed the 1000 logical qubit milestone in 2026

self_check.check: If 00_research/v1.json was present, v1.txt ends with ## Research Context block
Citations in merged block contain [1], [2], etc., matching dossier sources[] indices
If dossier was absent, research_ref is absent (not null, not '')

common_failures.failure: TXT empty (agent failed to fetch / wrote nothing)
JSON text empty or metadata.source_type invalid

failure_modes.name: URL fetch fails (404, timeout, 5xx)
failure_modes.handling: Write meta with validation.pending and a note in the feedback field.

failure_modes.name: PDF is encrypted or scanned (no text layer)
failure_modes.handling: Write what you can extract; meta.feedback says 'no text layer; downstream may be empty'.

failure_modes.name: Source > 1 MB
failure_modes.handling: Truncate at 1 MB with a note.

failure_modes.name: Source is a batch directory
failure_modes.handling: Process the first file only; tell @orch there are N more waiting.

failure_modes.name: Defensive: 00_research/v1.json missing
failure_modes.handling: Proceed without merging; leave metadata.research_ref absent.

refactor_delta.current_state: 5-step process + 30 lines of merge code in this spec's Process step 3.
refactor_delta.target_state: All process detail stays in this spec; the ingestor's JSON contract is the only agent truth.
concrete_steps: Keep the merge code block in this spec's Process step 3 (already moved).
Add a JSON variant to the schema's metadata block: ensure research_ref is explicitly optional in schemas/01_ingest.json.
